SELECT bitPositionsToArray(num) AS bit_positions FROM test_table;
SELECT bitPositionsToArray(toUInt8(num)) AS bit_positions FROM test_table WHERE num >= 0;
SELECT bitPositionsToArray(toInt32(5)) AS bit_positions, num FROM test_table;
SELECT num, bitPositionsToArray(num) AS bit_positions FROM test_table WHERE num BETWEEN 0 AND 15;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id Int64, value Int64);
SELECT t1.id, bitPositionsToArray(t1.value) AS bit_positions FROM test_table2 AS t1 JOIN test_table AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.num;
SELECT bitPositionsToArray((SELECT MAX(num) FROM test_table WHERE num < 10)) AS bit_positions;
SELECT bitPositionsToArray(toUInt64(num)) AS bit_positions FROM test_table WHERE num < 100;
